mechanics: Defeating a boss may unlock new difficulty
Some bosses summon minions during battle
Certain attacks may require dodging or timing

bosses.name: John the Lumberjack
bosses.description: Simple melee boss - good for practicing basic combat
bosses.strategy: Simple melee boss, good for practice

bosses.name: Goblin King
bosses.description: A goblin leader with minion summons
bosses.strategy: Clear goblin minions first before focusing on boss

bosses.name: The Kingslayer
bosses.description: The final boss of Grasslands. Has two phases. Was once the hero of Grassland Island, fallen to the Wrath.
bosses.phase2: At 50% HP or below, summons 3 random enemies (Bolts or Mages)
bosses.quote: Warrior… Is it peace that you seek? Yet you kill others for the illusion of harmony. Lend me the strength of your blood and you shall join the Wrath.
bosses.strategy: Kill adds first when phase 2 starts

bosses.name: Giant Sand Worm
bosses.description: A massive worm that burrows underground and attacks from below
bosses.strategy: Watch for underground movement, dodge when surfacing

bosses.name: Necros
bosses.description: A necromancer boss that can turn invisible and teleport
bosses.strategy: Difficult boss - track movement when invisible

bosses.name: Titan
bosses.description: A two-phase giant boss with slam and orb attacks
bosses.strategy: Learn attack patterns in phase 1 before committing

bosses.name: Giant Yeti
bosses.description: A massive yeti that throws snowballs and summons ice spikes
bosses.strategy: Dodge snowballs and ice spikes, punish after ground slam

bosses.name: The Musician
bosses.description: A unique boss that summons minions to protect itself

bosses.name: Kori
bosses.description: The final boss of Tundra. Has multiple devastating attacks.
bosses.strategy: Charge Beam attack - must hide behind rocks

bosses.name: John The Lumberjack
bosses.description: First miniboss after clearing 5 rooms. Noticeably bigger than the giant and wields a big axe.
bosses.strategy: Bigger than standard giants - watch for axe attacks

bosses.name: Giant Goblin
bosses.description: Second miniboss after clearing 5 rooms. Wields a sword-cannon combo. Paired with 2 Mortar Goblins and 2 Cannon Goblins.
bosses.strategy: Clear adds first - they're very dangerous together

bosses.name: Kingslayer
bosses.description: Final boss. At 50% HP summons 3 random enemies (Bolts or Mages).
bosses.strategy: Focus on adds when phase starts, then return to boss

wave5.tip: Use dash to dodge telegraphed attacks. Don't waste abilities.

wave10.tip: Kill adds first, then focus boss. Use campfire before engaging.

wave20.tip: Save ultimate abilities. Circle strafe to avoid combo attacks.

wave30.tip: Coordinate with team. Use Power/Timeless Ring for ability spam.
